channel.title: Blogs on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Mike Ball

item.title: Testing JavaScript with node:test
item.description: Using Node.js's built-in test runner and assertion library to avoid third-party test dependencies.

item.title: Terraform: natively reading GitHub release assets
item.description: Reading release assets in Terraform via the `github_release_asset` data source.

item.title: Infinity Cats
item.description: Cats forever wallpaper prints, made to order in the dimensions of your choosing. Reach out for pricing and details.

item.title: Terraform: self-validating plan-time permissions checks
item.description: How can a Terraform configuration test whether it has sufficient access to do its own work?

item.title: Packer: conditionally omit HCL block configuration
item.description: Conditionally configure AWS EC2 launch block device mappings in a Packer template.

item.title: Terraform Patterns: the wrapper module
item.description: An overview of the Terraform wrapper module pattern.

item.title: Scalable Terraform Patterns: Reuse and Repeatability
item.description: An overview of native Terraform constructs enabling reuse and repeatability.

item.title: Scalable Terraform patterns: compound workspace names
item.description: My overview of the Terraform compound workspace name pattern.

item.title: Automated Terraform Plan Analysis With Terratest
item.description: How can terratest be used to automate Terraform plan analysis?

item.title: Unit Testing AWS S3 Downloads in Go
item.description: How can a function wrapping the aws-sdk-go be unit tested using a local directory serving as a mock AWS S3 bucket?

item.title: Using tfmigrate to Codify and Automate Terraform State Operations
item.description: A demo illustrating the use of `tfmigrate` for automating complex Terraform state operations.

item.title: Using the gh-dash gh CLI Extension to Manage GitHub Notifications
item.description: How I use the gh-dash gh CLI extension to manage GitHub notifications.

item.title: Notes on Implementing Backstage
item.description: Some notes on my experience implementing Backstage for a large engineering organization.

item.title: Extending the gh CLI with Go
item.description: Some introductory tips on building gh CLI extensions in Go.

item.title: What is the Kubernetes controller pattern?
item.description: An introduction to the Kubernetes controller pattern.

item.title: What is the Kubernetes Operator Pattern?
item.description: An introduction to the Kubernetes operator pattern.

item.title: IP addressing, Networks, Subnets, and CIDR
item.description: A brief overview of IP addressing, with a focus on CIDR notation and an introduction to ipcalc.

item.title: Advanced Terraform Logic
item.description: A case study illustrating Terraform techniques for expressing moderately complex business logic.

item.title: Collecting Paginated HTTP API Response Data Using JavaScript's async/await
item.description: Collect all pages of data from a paginated HTTP API in JavaScript using async/await.

item.title: Querying GitHub Release Data With gh and jq
item.description: Fetch the latest patch release of each of the latest 5 minor versions of Grafana

item.title: Terraform Provider Development Demystified
item.description: An introduction to Terraform provider development patterns

item.title: Mocking aws-sdk With Jest
item.description: How can the aws-sdk be mocked using jest?

item.title: Multi-stage Docker Builds
item.description: An introduction to leveraging multi-stage container image builds.

item.title: Transforming Terraform Output Values to Markdown with Terraputs
item.description: An introduction to using terraputs.

item.title: Triggering GitHub Actions From Outside of GitHub
item.description: An introduction to using custom repository dispatch events to trigger GitHub Actions.

item.title: Go Test Parallelization
item.description: Leveraging concurrency in Go tests.

item.title: Terraform Plan Validation With Open Policy Agent
item.description: Automating Terraform plan analysis with Open Policy Agent

item.title: Using Terraform workspaces
item.description: Terraform workspaces, their arguable advantages, and some thoughts on naming convention.

item.title: An Intro to Unix File Permissions
item.description: A brief, beginners' guide and cheat sheet to Unix file permissions.

item.title: Go Concurrency With Goroutines and Channels
item.description: An(other) introduction to Go concurrency, goroutines, and channels.

item.title: HTTP Middleware in Go with httptest.ResponseRecorder
item.description: A technique for creating Go HTTP middleware.

item.title: A systemd Cheat Sheet
item.description: A personal systemd overview and cheat sheet

item.title: Testing Ansible Roles With Docker-in-Docker
item.description: How to develop and test Ansible roles with Molecule and Docker.

item.title: How to Make a Concourse Resource Type
item.description: How to implement a custom Concourse resource type.

item.title: Channels in Go
item.description: A brief intro to Go concurrency through channels and goroutines.

item.title: Committing Via the Concourse Git Resource
item.description: How to commit to a git repo from Concourse using the git resource.

item.title: Serialize Empty Structs to JSON in Go
item.description: How to avoid serializing an empty struct to JSON in Go?

item.title: Using the ConcourseCI pull request resource to verify Docker builds
item.description: How to verify a Docker image pull request in ConcourseCI.

item.title: Using OptionParser in Rake
item.description: How to use Ruby OptionParser in Rake

item.title: Using wget over Ansible's get_url
item.description: Authenticated downloads with Ansible

item.title: Apache Persistent Connection Problems
item.description: Debugging an exhausted Apache worker thread pool.

item.title: Secure Session Cookie in Rails over HTTPS
item.description: How to ensure the secure flag is present in your Apache-fronted Rails app's session cookies.

item.title: How to Test Google Polymer elements on Travis CI
item.description: How to run a headless Firefox on Travis CI via Xvfb

item.title: JSConf 2015: Headless Testing Against Real Web Browsers
item.description: An overview of my JSConf 2015 talk on headlessly testing against real web browsers.

item.title: NW.js Chromium data-path
item.description: How to ensure against persistant cookies and local storage data between installs of an nw.js app.

item.title: Creating a Windows Installer for a node-webkit App on Mac OS
item.description: How to create a Windows app installer on the Mac OS command line using makensis.

item.title: All CSS Modal Dialogs
item.description: A simple example demonstrating all-CSS, no-JavaScript modal dialogs.

item.title: JavaScript Modules
item.description: A few notes on JavaScript modules.

item.title: Rails API Integration Tests
item.description: A simple pattern for authoring integration tests for a Rails app.

item.title: A Simple Ruby Class Example
item.description: A basic Ruby class example to illustrate a few of the language's features.

item.title: Automating Product Availability Alerts
item.description: Too much internet. Automate your web browsing.

item.title: Automated Tests: What, Why, How?
item.description: An overview of automated tests for the uninitiated.

item.title: Nicar 2013 Conference
item.description: A few NICAR 2013 highlights and reflections.

item.title: Using Google Spreadsheets and Tabletop.js as a Web Application Back-end
item.description: How to use Tabletop.js as your JavaScript app's datastore.

item.title: Streamlined Rails Gem Updates on Gem in a Box
item.description: Some small shell scripts to automate manual gem downloads & uploads.

item.title: Using the phl_geocode Ruby Gem
item.description: An overview of a small Ruby gem I built on Philadelphia's public geodata.

item.title: Using the civic-info Node.js Module to Get Voter and Election Info
item.description: A quick tutorial in using a simple NPM module I built.

item.title: Deploying an Express App to Heroku
item.description: A beginner's tutorial in deploying a Node.js app to Heroku.

item.title: Testing Node.js with Mocha, Expect.js, and Nock
item.description: A technique for mocking HTTP requests in your Node.js tests.

item.title: Icon Sprites with Compass
item.description: CSS authoring can hurt. Compass abstracts away the pain.

item.title: Using Mocha to Test a Node.js Server
item.description: Using Node.js's fork to write tests against a server.

item.title: Collecting Basic Team and Sprint Metrics with Git
item.description: Leveraging git in collecting team performance metrics. Management likes numbers.

item.title: Setting Up Postgres on Mac OSX with Homebrew
item.description: My notes on getting postgres running on Mac OS via a homebrew installation.

item.title: Fluent 2012 Notes: Nicholas Zakas on Maintainable JavaScript
item.description: My notes on Nichalas Zakas' Fluent 2012 talk.

item.title: Deploying Wordpress to Pagodabox
item.description: A beginner's guide to deploying a Wordpress app to Pagodabox's cloud service.

item.title: Lobbying.ph
item.description: Leveraging open data to track Philly lobbying efforts.

item.title: Using South on a Heroku-hosted Django Project
item.description: How to add new fields to an existing, Heroku-hosted Django project's database.

item.title: Basic Command Line Tools
item.description: Some beginner's notes; collected for a recently-hired junior developer.

item.title: How to Contribute to a Project on GitHub
item.description: A simple how-to outlining the Github fork, branch, and PR workflow.

item.title: CSS3: An All-CSS, Image-less Play Button
item.description: I wondered if it could be done; here's a quick and dirty technique.

item.title: CSS3: Using Transform to Make a Cube
item.description: My quick solution to a CSS challenge.

item.title: How to Make Testable Private Methods in JavaScript
item.description: A controversial technique for writing unit tests against private methods.

item.title: JavaScript Design Patterns
item.description: My notes on Addy Osmani's JavaScript design patterns ebook.

item.title: Simplified Find/Replace from the Command Line
item.description: An overview of a quick bash function I recently wrote.

item.title: How to Exclude Files from SVN Commits
item.description: A bash function for working around a Subversion annoyance.

item.title: Basic Overview of the Surround Plugin for Vim
item.description: My notes on using Vim's surround plugin.

item.title: Quiet Logger: HTML5 WordPress Theme
item.description: An overview of a basic Wordpress theme I was tasked in creating.

item.title: Hometown Typeface
item.description: A typeface I created in illustrator.

item.title: OurPhiladelphia.org Launched
item.description: Some colleagues and I recently released ourphiladelphia.org.
